title: Deliciously Crumbly Peruvian Baby Pak Koi Picarones
description: A traditional Peruvian dish featuring baby pak koi, with a mustardy and crumbly texture, made into picarones and cooked on a tava griddle.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the chopped baby pak koi, flour, cornstarch, grated cheese, mustard seeds, salt, and sugar.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs and milk.
Add the egg mixture to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Divide the dough into small balls and flatten each ball into a picarone shape.
Heat a tava griddle over medium heat and cook the picarones for 3 minutes on each side.
Repeat the cooking process until all the picarones are cooked.
Serve the picarones hot and enjoy.
